name: golang-golang-x-oauth2-dev
title: golang-golang-x-oauth2-dev
summary: make OAuth2 authorized and authenticated HTTP requests
description:
make OAuth2 authorized and authenticated HTTP requests
Package oauth2 provides support for making OAuth2 authorized and authenticated
HTTP requests. It can additionally grant authorization with Bearer JWT.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-golang-x-oauth2-dev because make OAuth2 authorized and authenticated HTTP requests.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-golang-x-oauth2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-golang-x-oauth2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-golang-x-oauth2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
